package rulecoverage

func NegativeTransportLayerUsesUntypedStringCodesWithoutCatalog() string {
    ruleID := "transport_layer_uses_untyped_string_codes_without_catalog"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Response code strings that have no shared type or catalog package."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
